nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Banded antbird
nodes.summary: Banded antbird（Banded antbird，学名 Dichrozona cincta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于羅伯特·里奇韋、常綠森林、森林。

nodes.name: 羅伯特·里奇韋
nodes.summary: 羅伯特·里奇韋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括小加拿大雁、乌镰翅鸡、Blue-crowned parakeet等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | image_alt = A bird, around half the size of the hand holding it, with a pale neck and chest, and gold-silver bands of feathers across its dark back, | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Dichrozona | parent_authority = Ridgway, 1888 | species = cincta | authority = (Pelzeln, 1868) | synonyms = |synonyms_ref = |range_map = Dichrozona cincta map.svg }} The banded antbird (Dichrozona cincta) – sometimes called banded antwren despite not being close to the true antwrens – is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: zononota is found in southern Peru, northwestern Bolivia, and west-central Brazil. The species inhabits evergreen forest, primarily terra firme away from waterways, and favors areas with an open understorey and much leaf litter
